name: Incident
text: Loud alarms echo through the complex as engineers report abnormal radiation readings. Although no catastrophic breach has occurred because of automatic safety system, the news has already unsettled the nearby populations. The public demand answers. Industry leaders demands continuity. Camera strobe flashes. You have to choose.

choices.text: No need to worry, everything is under control.
We will shut down the reactors for maintenance and repair.
uniques: [-5 Production] <in cities with a [Nuclear Plant]> <for [5] turns>

choices.text: To prevent future meltdown, we will install new and improved modules to power plants.
uniques: Gain a free [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] [in all cities]
Unavailable <if [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] is constructed>

name: Meltdown
text: Catastrophic failure has occurred. The reactor lost control, melting the facility and emitting radiation to massive area. Evacuations are underway. Trust in nuclear power has collapsed overnight.

choices.text: Nuclear power is too dangerous to handle. Dismantle them.
uniques: [-100]% Production when constructing [Nuclear Plant] buildings [in all cities] <for [30] turns>
[-3 Production] <in cities with a [Nuclear Plant]> <for [1] turns>

choices.text: Rebuild it, and to prevent future meltdown, install new and improved modules to all our power plants.
uniques: [-3 Production] <in cities with a [Nuclear Plant]> <for [1] turns>
Gain a free [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] [in all cities]
Unavailable <if [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] is constructed>

name: Explosion
text: The worst case scenario happened. A sudden and catastrophic explosion has devastated a facility. Nuclear plant and many other buildings are destroyed, damaged or contaminated. The power generation has collapsed, just like the trust to nuclear power did.

choices.text: Nuclear power is too dangerous to handle. Dismantle them.
uniques: [-100]% Production when constructing [Nuclear Plant] buildings [in all cities] <for [50] turns>
